_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: However, 48 h after returning flies to unlabeled food, Nf1 P1 flies retained significantly less 14 C than controls. This suggests that Nf1 P1 mutants exhibited significantly elevated rates of lipolysis
details: Elevated rates of lipolysis with significantly less 14C retention at 48h after returning to unlabeled food (p < 0.001)
